headline: Boeing close to 500-jet order with Trump-Xi summit
summary: The two sides also are in talks for a widebody sale that includes about 100 Boeing 787 Dreamliner and 777X jets, said the people, who asked not to be identified as the talks are confidential.  Boeing’s aircraft stand to feature prominently in a trade agreement between China President Xi Jinping and Trump, who has used the US planemaker as a tool to sweeten accords with other governments.

headline: Howmet Gains From Strength in Commercial Aerospace: Will the Momentum Last?
summary: HWM rides strong commercial aerospace demand as engine products sales jump, with defense programs adding further growth momentum.

headline: Dow Jones Futures Fall As Oil Keeps Surging; Jobs Report On Tap
summary: Dow Jones futures fell modestly Friday morning, along with S&P 500 futures and Nasdaq futures as crude oil prices continued to surge on the Iran conflict. The February jobs report is due before the open.

headline: U.S. payrolls unexpectedly fell by 92,000 in February; unemployment rate rises to 4.4%
summary: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase 50,000 in February while the unemployment rate held steady at 4.3%.

headline: How Iran and Venezuela strikes transform the Trump-Xi trade talks
summary: The Iran war and the U.S. attack in Venezuela show a Trump administration more willing to eschew diplomacy and take military action.

headline: Dow Jones Futures Rise, Oil Prices Halt Surge; Broadcom, Nvidia In Focus
summary: Dow Jones futures rose slightly overnight, along with S&P 500 futures and Nasdaq futures. The February jobs report is due before the open. Costco Wholesale and Marvell Technology headlined earnings after the close.

headline: Is General Electric (GE) Pricing In Too Much Optimism After Its 1 Year 67% Rally
summary: If you are wondering whether General Electric's current share price is giving you a fair deal or asking you to pay up, you are not alone in questioning what the stock is really worth. The stock last closed at US$326.99, with a 4.1% decline over the past 7 days, a 5.5% gain over 30 days and a 67.7% return over 1 year. These movements can change how investors view both its potential and its risks. Recent news coverage has focused on General Electric's position as a major industrial player and...
